name: locked_with_zero_base
description: Locked AND base_stop_level == 0.0: floor returns 0.0 (boundary equality with 0.0 sentinel).
derivation: dynamic_activation = 0.8. threshold = 0.6. current_return (1.0) >= 0.6 -> ticks++ -> 8. Already locked. Locked AND base (0.0) -> stop = max(0.0, 0.0) = 0.0. Pins the exact equality with the structural-zero floor.
